# all-features section.

pub dssim_gpu::ResolvedMode::Strip

pub struct dssim_gpu::Dssim<R: cubecl_runtime::runtime::Runtime>
impl<R: cubecl_runtime::runtime::Runtime> dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::clear_reference(&mut self)
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::compute(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> dssim_gpu::Result<dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult>
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::compute_handles(&mut self, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle) -> dssim_gpu::Result<dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult>
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::compute_stripped(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> dssim_gpu::Result<dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult>
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::compute_with_reference(&mut self, &[u8]) -> dssim_gpu::Result<dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult>
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::dimensions(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::is_strip_mode(&self) -> bool
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::n_scales(&self) -> usize
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::new(cubecl_runtime::client::ComputeClient<R>, u32, u32) -> dssim_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::new_strip(cubecl_runtime::client::ComputeClient<R>, u32, u32, u32) -> dssim_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::new_with_memory_mode(cubecl_runtime::client::ComputeClient<R>, u32, u32, dssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode) -> dssim_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::pack_srgb_into_packed_u32_handle(&self, &[u8]) -> dssim_gpu::Result<cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle>
pub fn dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>::set_reference(&mut self, &[u8]) -> dssim_gpu::Result<()>

impl<R> core::marker::Send for dssim_gpu::Dssim<R>

impl dssim_gpu::DssimOpaque

pub fn dssim_gpu::DssimOpaque::compute_handles(&mut self, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle) -> dssim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn dssim_gpu::DssimOpaque::compute_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> dssim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn dssim_gpu::DssimOpaque::compute_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> dssim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn dssim_gpu::DssimOpaque::compute_with_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> dssim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn dssim_gpu::DssimOpaque::dims(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn dssim_gpu::DssimOpaque::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn dssim_gpu::DssimOpaque::n_scales(&self) -> usize

pub fn dssim_gpu::DssimOpaque::set_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> dssim_gpu::Result<()>

pub struct dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult
pub dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult::score: f64
impl core::clone::Clone for dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult

impl core::marker::Freeze for dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult
impl core::marker::Send for dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult
impl core::marker::Sync for dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult

impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for dssim_gpu::GpuDssimResult
pub const dssim_gpu::NUM_SCALES: usize
pub const dssim_gpu::SCALE_WEIGHTS: [f64; 5]
pub fn dssim_gpu::estimate_gpu_memory_bytes(u32, u32) -> usize
pub fn dssim_gpu::estimate_strip_gpu_memory_bytes(u32, u32) -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn dssim_gpu::vram_cap_bytes() -> usize
pub type dssim_gpu::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, dssim_gpu::Error>
